title: eusteralis stellata
intro: Eusteralis stellata, also known as the "Australian Star Bush," is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Eusteralis stellata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
